queries.natural_language: List row_id, event_date, member_last_name from attendance where row_id is <= 97.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "event_date", "member_last_name" FROM "attendance" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 97);

queries.natural_language: List row_id, member_last_name, event_name from attendance where row_id is >= 227.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "member_last_name", "event_name" FROM "attendance" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 227);

queries.natural_language: List type, row_id, city from zip_code where type contains 'box'.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "row_id", "city" FROM "zip_code" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("type" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%box%');

queries.natural_language: List type, city, county from zip_code where type equals 'PO Box'.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "city", "county" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("type" = 'PO Box');

queries.natural_language: Find state, county, short_state from zip_code where state equals 'Massachusetts' and row_id is <= 249.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "county", "short_state" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("state" = 'Massachusetts') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 249);

queries.natural_language: Find state, city, county from zip_code where state contains 'massachusetts' and row_id is <= 249.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "city", "county" FROM "zip_code" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("state" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%massachusetts%') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 249);

queries.natural_language: Find type, state, city from zip_code where type contains 'box' and county contains 'county'.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "state", "city" FROM "zip_code" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("type" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%box%') AND (LOWER(CAST("county" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%county%');

queries.natural_language: Find type, state, row_id from zip_code where type equals 'PO Box' and county contains 'county'.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "state", "row_id" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("type" = 'PO Box') AND (LOWER(CAST("county" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%county%');

queries.natural_language: Find state, short_state, city from zip_code where state equals 'Maine' and type equals 'Standard'.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "short_state", "city" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("state" = 'Maine') AND ("type" = 'Standard');

queries.natural_language: Find short_state, state, row_id from zip_code where short_state equals 'ME' and type contains 'standard'.
queries.sql: SELECT "short_state", "state", "row_id" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("short_state" = 'ME') AND (LOWER(CAST("type" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%standard%');

queries.natural_language: Find state, city, short_state from zip_code where state equals 'Maine' and row_id is >= 99.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "city", "short_state" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("state" = 'Maine') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 99);

queries.natural_language: Find short_state, state, city from zip_code where short_state equals 'ME' and type equals 'Standard'.
queries.sql: SELECT "short_state", "state", "city" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("short_state" = 'ME') AND ("type" = 'Standard');

queries.natural_language: Find state, city, type from zip_code where state contains 'massachusetts', row_id is <= 349, and row_id is >= 99.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "city", "type" FROM "zip_code" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("state" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%massachusetts%') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 349) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 99);

queries.natural_language: Find short_state, state, county from zip_code where short_state equals 'MA', type equals 'Standard', and row_id is >= 99.
queries.sql: SELECT "short_state", "state", "county" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("short_state" = 'MA') AND ("type" = 'Standard') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 99);

queries.natural_language: Find state, short_state, city from zip_code where state equals 'Massachusetts', row_id is between 99 and 399, and row_id is >= 149.
queries.sql: SELECT "state", "short_state", "city" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("state" = 'Massachusetts') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 99 AND CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 399) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 149);

queries.natural_language: Find short_state, type, county from zip_code where short_state equals 'ME', state equals 'Maine', and row_id is >= 99.
queries.sql: SELECT "short_state", "type", "county" FROM "zip_code" WHERE ("short_state" = 'ME') AND ("state" = 'Maine') AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 99);
